title: Mark IV fuel cell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Mark IV fuel cell''' was a power cell used in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and commercial [[Starship/Legends|craft]].

==History==
75 Mark IV fuel cells were installed in standard models of the [[ZH-25 Questor-class light freighter|Starfeld ZH-25 Questor]] giving it the ability to last for 2.9 standard months between refueling. This suggests that about 26 Mark IV fuel cells would be required to keep a ship like the ZH-25 Questor going for one standard month.
